element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic mechanics of grappling, striking, stamina management against single opponent
Coordination with NPC partner, commanding ally to attack inside/outside ring, managing two fighters
Multi-fighter elimination mechanics, stamina conservation across multiple rounds, team tactics
Sequential battles against all 9 wrestlers as 'Yourself' character, escalating difficulty and wrestler movesets
Cooperative multiplayer championship run, coordinated tag strategy against increasingly skilled AI tag teams
Each of 9 wrestlers (Hogan, André, Warrior, Savage, Beefcake, Boss Man, Rude, Duggan, Yourself) has unique albeit small moveset requiring adaptation
Managing stamina depletion creates vulnerability to pinfall; forces pacing and risk calculation

typical_relief_triggers: Elimination of opponent in Survivor Series
typical_tension_triggers: Championship match progression against tougher wrestlers
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Match-based rhythm with stamina management creating micro-cycles of aggression and recovery within each bout; championship mode creates macro progression of escalating difficulty

difficulty_curve.early_game: One-on-one matches introduce basic combat mechanics and individual wrestler characteristics; stamina system learned through low-stakes matches
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Tag team modes introduce complexity of NPC partner coordination and multi-fighter awareness; Survivor Series 3v3 eliminates players who cannot manage multiple simultaneous threats
difficulty_curve.late_game: Championship mode forces sequential mastery of all 9 unique wrestler movesets; each opponent presents different stamina/speed/strength profile requiring tactical adaptation
notable_spikes: Transition from one-on-one to Survivor Series (3v3 simultaneous threat management)
André the Giant and Ultimate Warrior encounters in championship mode (documented as distinct physical archetypes)
Final opponents in championship run (cumulative fatigue from prior matches)

notable_level_patterns.description: High-angle isometric view of wrestling ring with stamina bars visible on apron; consistent spatial presentation across all match types
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All match modes utilize identical ring presentation

notable_level_patterns.description: Championship mode sequences player through encounters with 9 distinct wrestlers in order of increasing difficulty/skill; each fighter has small but unique moveset requiring tactical relearning
Empty stamina bar renders player vulnerable to pinfall; creates forced rhythm of aggression followed by recovery phases
3v3 elimination match with up to 4 fighters in ring simultaneously; requires awareness of multiple threat vectors and ally positioning

sources_used: wikipedia - WWF WrestleMania Challenge gameplay section
tcrf - WWF WrestleMania Challenge main article
